Monday 29th March 2021

I've spent the last two days walking. Haven't had time for really chilling out. At least this week is a four day week with a four day WEEKEND! So today I'm gonna get some work done but I'm also going to take it easy.

EMAILS: I have gone through my emails and there is nothing to action.

MEETINGS: 9am Anne Jungblut

LAB: 11.30am - 2.30pm Lab work prepping equipment and chat with Michelle about where we're at.

MISSION: Finish going through Svalbard trip notes and addition to document 'My-Amazing-Svalbard-Trip-Document.doc'. Start to address questions from sections 3-6 by talking to Anne, Michelle and emailing James.

ACHIEVED: I have added all my notes to my giant document! Yay! Now I'm going to go through the document and systematically answer all the questions I have with the support of my supervisors and lab staff at QMUL. Amazing!

I have wrapped 100x glass 10ml exetainer lid stoppers in combusted foil and attached the lids.
I have acid washed and rinsed 75x 50ml falcon tubes ready for drying.
I have put the plastic lids back on 24x 100ml Duran bottles (10% HNO3 acid washed), 12x 250ml Duran bottles (10% HNO3 acid washed) and 2x 500ml Duran bottles (10% HNO3 acid washed).
I have emailed James regarding remaining travel/equipment questions to make sure I'm doing the right thing! 
I had a meeting with Anne about what clothes etc I need to pack.
I've replied to an email from Rey regarding a meeting to do with the trip.
